declaration.code:
@backDeployed(before: macOS 26.0, iOS 26.0, tvOS 26.0, watchOS 26.0, visionOS 26.0)
init(
    subframes: Int16,
    subframeDivisor: Int16,
    counter: UInt32,
    type: CVSMPTETimeType,
    flags: CVSMPTETimeFlags = .valid,
    hours: Int16,
    minutes: Int16,
    seconds: Int16,
    frames: Int16
)

iOS 4.0+iPadOS 4.0+Mac Catalyst 4.0+macOS 10.4+tvOS 9.0+visionOS 1.0+watchOS 4.0+

```
@backDeployed(before: macOS 26.0, iOS 26.0, tvOS 26.0, watchOS 26.0, visionOS 26.0)

    subframes: Int16,

    hours: Int16,
    minutes: Int16,
    seconds: Int16,
    frames: Int16
)
```
